breakdown: This PR refactors the rewards engine by moving level-up related functions (_is_state_flag_*, resolve_level_up_signal, ensure_rewards_box, etc.) from game_state.py into a new dedicated rewards_engine.py module, following single-responsibility principles. The code shows good architectural separation and test coverage for import regression, but documentation is minimal and error handling patterns aren't visible in the truncated diff. Naming is generally clear for public functions though some private helpers could be more descriptive.
key_changes: Moved _is_state_flag_false, _is_state_flag_true, resolve_level_up_signal from game_state to rewards_engine
Added new functions ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active, project_level_up_ui to rewards_engine
Updated world_logic.py imports to source from rewards_engine instead of game_state
